activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline

activities.name: cp_toolhound_inventory_source_to_stage
activities.description: Copies data from source to stage.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat('select partno.varPartNo as partNo,
       replace(replace(parttxt.varDescription, CHAR(10),''''),CHAR(13),'''') as Description,
       parttxt.varUserField1 as ident,
       invID.varInventoryID as ItemID,
       categorytbl.varCategory as category,
       subcategorytbl.varCategory as subcategory,
       invType.varInventoryType as InventoryType,
       invLocationtxt.varLocationName as LocationName,
       invLocation.varBinShelf as BinShelf,
       invLocation.intMinOnHand as MinOnHand,
       invLocation.intMaxOnHand as MaxOnHand,
       invLocation.intQtyOnHand as QtyOnHand,
       invLocation.intIssued as Issued,
       invLocation.intInTransitInbound as TransitInBound,
       invLocation.intReserved as Reserved,
       invLocation.intInKit as InKit,
       invLocation.intTotal as Total,
       invLocation.intInTransitOutbound as InTransitOutBound,
       invLocation.intOnPurchaseOrder as OnPurchaseOrder
from [dbo].[tblInventory] partno,
     [dbo].[tblInventoryText] parttxt,
     [dbo].[tblInventoryID] invID,
     [dbo].[tblCategoryText] categorytbl,
     [dbo].[tblCategoryText] subcategorytbl,
     [dbo].[tblInventoryTypeText] invType,
     [dbo].[tblInventoryLocation] invLocation,
     [dbo].[tblLocationText] invLocationtxt
where partno.intInventoryID = parttxt.intInventoryID
  and partno.intInventoryTypeID = invType.intInventoryTypeID
  and partno.intInventoryID = invID.intInventoryID
  and parttxt.varLocaleID = invType.varLocaleID
  and partno.intInventoryID = invLocation.intInventoryID
  and invLocation.intLocationID = invLocationtxt.intLocationID 
  and partno.intCategoryID = categorytbl.intCategoryID
  and parttxt.varLocaleID = categorytbl.varLocaleID
  and partno.intSubCategoryID = subcategorytbl.intCategoryID
  and parttxt.varLocaleID = subcategorytbl.varLocaleID
  and partno.dteModifiedDate >= ''', activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.last_run_start_date,'''')

activities.name: sp_update_parameter
activities.description: Updates the parameters and it's values
